touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message sent to Ava Weber introducing AskElephant's forecasting capabilities. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Ava Weber. Left voicemail mentioning AskElephant's approach to improving sales forecasting accuracy. No callback.

Connected with Ava Weber for 8 minutes. She acknowledged current challenges with forecast reliability and agreed to a qualification call. Showed initial interest in automating their pipeline visibility.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest frustration with your current forecasting process?
questions_asked.answer: We're constantly surprised by deals slipping. Our reps update Salesforce but the data doesn't tell us much about actual deal health.

next_steps: Schedule 30-minute qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute qualification call with Ava Weber. Discussed SentinelEngine's 20-person sales team and inconsistent forecasting methodology. Ava confirmed budget authority and expressed urgency around Q2 planning. Identified need for both automation and implementation support.

questions_asked.question: How do you currently predict which deals will close?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly gut feel from our VPs and weekly pipeline reviews. We have stage data but no real signal extraction.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Salesforce and our existing call recording tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and can pull from Gong, Chorus, or most major conversation intelligence platforms.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the timeline on this? Why now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO is pushing for better predictability. We missed our Q4 number by 18% and she wants systems in place before mid-year planning.

next_steps: Send follow-up email with case study
Loop in technical evaluator for platform review

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Ava with case study from similar mid-market SaaS company that improved forecast accuracy by 32%. Ava responded positively and introduced Caleb Tanaka from their ops team to evaluate technical fit.

questions_asked.question: Can you share more detail on the implementation timeline in that case study?
questions_asked.answer: That customer was live in 4 weeks — 1 week for data integration, 2 weeks for model training on historical data, and 1 week for user onboarding.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Caleb Tanaka

touches.ai_summary: Brief email exchange confirming technical eval agenda and sending Caleb pre-call materials including data requirements doc and integration architecture overview. Ava cc'd to keep her in the loop.
next_steps: Technical evaluation scheduled for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: 62-minute deep-dive technical evaluation with Caleb Tanaka. Walked through data pipeline architecture, API integration points, and model training process. Caleb expressed concerns about data quality in their current CRM but was impressed with AskElephant's feature engineering approach. Discussed security and compliance requirements.

questions_asked.question: How does your system handle incomplete or inconsistent CRM data?
questions_asked.answer: We use feature engineering to extract signals even from sparse data — things like response time patterns, stage velocity, and contact engagement. We can show you a data quality audit as part of the trial.

questions_asked.question: What's your approach to model explainability? Our leadership will want to understand why the system makes certain predictions.
questions_asked.answer: We provide feature importance scores and deal-level explanations. You can see which signals are driving each forecast — discount size, executive engagement, competitor presence, etc.

questions_asked.question: What's your current data infrastructure — are you on Salesforce Enterprise or Professional?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise. We also use Outreach for sequencing and just started piloting Gong for call recording.

objections: Our CRM data hygiene isn't great — I'm worried the model won't have enough quality inputs to work with.
next_steps: Run data quality assessment on SentinelEngine's Salesforce instance
Schedule follow-up to review audit results

touches.ai_summary: 37-minute follow-up technical call with Caleb to review data audit results. Showed that despite some gaps, SentinelEngine has sufficient historical deal data (142 closed-won, 89 closed-lost over 18 months) to train an effective model. Caleb gave technical green light and committed to championing internally.

questions_asked.question: How long until we'd see ROI on this? What's realistic for accuracy improvement in the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Based on your data profile, we'd expect 20-25% improvement in forecast accuracy within 60 days. Full ROI typically hits around month 4-5 when reps are fully adopted and the model has a full quarter of feedback.

questions_asked.question: What level of ongoing support will you need from your team once we're live?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal — maybe 2-3 hours a month. The system mostly runs itself once it's trained. We'd assign someone to monitor data sync and flag any anomalies.

next_steps: Caleb to brief Ava and CEO on technical feasibility

touches.ai_summary: Email from Ava requesting pricing for 20 seats plus implementation support. Mentioned that CEO Aria Almeida is engaged and wants to see a proposal before their board meeting next week. Ava noted budget is tight but project is a priority.

questions_asked.question: What does your implementation package typically include?
questions_asked.answer: For 20 seats we'd include full data integration setup, custom model training, 2 weeks of onboarding workshops, and 90 days of premium support. We can also do ongoing consulting if you want help interpreting signals and coaching reps.

next_steps: Send pricing proposal with automation + consulting package

touches.ai_summary: 26-minute pricing call with Ava. Walked through $15,800 proposal for automations_plus_consulting package. Ava expressed concern about budget constraints and asked for flexibility on pricing. Discussed ROI model and offered to present to CEO if helpful. Ava requested discount to fit within approved budget.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on this number? We're at about $12k approved budget for this initiative.
questions_asked.answer: Let me talk to my manager about what we can do. Given your timeline and the strategic nature of this project, I think we can find a way to make it work.

questions_asked.question: If we can get creative on pricing, how quickly could you move to signature?
questions_asked.answer: If we land around $12k and Aria signs off, we could close this week. She's presenting the operations plan to the board on Friday and wants to include this as a committed investment.

objections: The budget is a real constraint — I love the product but need to hit our approved number.
next_steps: Prepare final proposal for CEO review

touches.ai_summary: 21-minute pricing negotiation call with Ava. Offered revised pricing at $15,800 (24.2% discount from list) to accommodate budget while maintaining consulting scope. Ava accepted and confirmed CEO Aria is aligned. Discussed contract terms, start date, and success metrics. Ava committed to routing for signature by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure this as quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can do quarterly billing at this price point. I'll include that in the contract.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for you in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: If we can get forecast accuracy into the 80-85% range and our reps are actually using the system to prioritize deals, that's a huge win. Right now we're around 65% accurate.

next_steps: Send final contract with quarterly payment terms
Schedule kickoff call with Caleb for week of signature
Ava to route for exec signature
